name: IpSetSocketOption
title: IpSetSocketOption
syntax: long IpSetSocketOption( dword socket, long level, long name, long value); // form 1
long IpSetSocketOption( dword socket, char level[], char name[], long value); // form 2
description: The function modifies a socket option.
The function is dependent on the selected stack.

parameters.name: level
parameters.description: The level at which the option is defined, e.g. SOL_SOCKET (0xFFFF). See Socket Options for all supported socket levels.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The socket option name to be modified, e.g. SO_BROADCAST (0x0020). See Socket Options for all supported socket options.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The value to be set for the socket option.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
